mnemonics: JTextField: Just Text Fields For Entering Data
keyPoints: A lightweight component for editing a single line of text.
It can generate ActionEvent when the user presses the enter key.
Commonly used in forms to get user input like names, passwords, or search queries.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to add an ActionListener to handle the 'Enter' key press.
Not validating the input text, leading to potential errors or security issues.
Using it for multi-line input instead of JTextArea.
